channel.title: Flask on Qi Le
channel.description: Recent content in Flask on Qi Le

item.title: SynSpot
item.description: Develop Python-based software and related infrastructure for research purposes, which means the project would help researchers in utilizing the data with Machine Learning Algorithm. This application to help various entities assist each other in supervised learning tasks without sharing data, models, and objective function.

item.title: Web Application
item.description: Designed a Game Information Interactive Reviewing Website to interact with visitors. Increasing cost time for associative-word search from 3951ms to 6ms under 1000 executions using implemented Trie Tree and Python Session, compared to PostgreSQL fuzzy search. Supported the authentication using flask + authlib + auth0. Built a data warehouse to store multi-sourced data about game Information and updated comments with PostgreSQL. Utilized jQuery and Pure CSS to build the frontend which provides users with self-guide exploration for game content (https://secret-sea-72576.
